SEARCH
Package org.Buffer

Class TerminalLine

java.lang.Object
org.Buffer.TerminalLine
public class TerminalLine extends Object
Represents a terminal line, i.e. the entire string of characters up to its parent screen buffer's width Stores both its CharacterCell string and whether it wraps from the previous line

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TerminalLine(int width)
    Default constructor for an unwrapped line
    TerminalLine(int width, boolean wrapped)
    Creates a new Terminal line Throws an IllegalArgumentException for negative values of capacity

    Method
    Description
    void
    add(int index, CharacterCell cell)
    Adds a new character cell at a specific index Throws an IndexOutOfBoundsException if the given index is not in the range [0, size)

    Adds a new character cell at a specific index

  • Constructor Details

    • TerminalLine

      public TerminalLine(int width, boolean wrapped)
      Creates a new Terminal line Throws an IllegalArgumentException for negative values of capacity
      Parameters:
      width - the width of the TerminalLine

    • TerminalLine

      public TerminalLine(int width)
      Default constructor for an unwrapped line
      Parameters:
      width - the width of the new TerminalLine

  • Method Details

    • getWrapped

      public boolean getWrapped()
      Returns:
      whether this line wraps from the previous one

    • getCharacters

      public ArrayList<CharacterCell> getCharacters()
      Returns:
      the internal CharacterCell this object stores

    • get

      public CharacterCell get(int index)
      Gets the character cell at a specific index Throws an IndexOutOfBoundsException if the given index is not in the range [0, size)
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the character cell we want to retrieve
      Returns:
      the character cell at the provided index

    • add

      public void add(int index, CharacterCell cell)
      Adds a new character cell at a specific index Throws an IndexOutOfBoundsException if the given index is not in the range [0, size)
      Parameters:
      index - the index where the new cell should be added
      cell - the new cell to add

    • add

      public void add(CharacterCell cell)
      Adds a new character cell at a specific index
      Parameters:
      cell - the new cell to add

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns:
      the number of characters in this line

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears the characters stored in this TerminalLine

    • addAll

      public void addAll(Collection<? extends CharacterCell> c)
      Wrapper for ArrayList.addAll()

    • remove

      public void remove(int index)
      Wrapper for ArrayList.remove()
